item.title: How to use OhMyPosh to decorate your terminal
item.description: 1. PowershellAt the beginning, I was trying to implement it on WindowsPowershell and result in a mess which I’ve forgot(For more information about the differences between them, please check out this [page](Differences between Windows PowerShell 5.1 and PowerShell 7.x - PowerShell | Microsoft Learn)). Then I strictly follow steps on the official [document](Introduction | Oh My Posh) while at the same time still encounter some problems. Here I will show the proper way I’ve tried on to complete this task.
